children.name:
ROLE_USER should not have access to search/places
  Expected: Forbidden
  But was:  Unauthorized

Multiple failures or warnings in test:
  1)   Status code should be 201 Created
  Expected: Created
  But was:  Forbidden

  2)   Response body should be true upon successful creation
  Expected: String containing "true"
  But was:  "{"timestamp":"2026-05-20T07:41:46.757+00:00","status":403,"error":"Forbidden","path":"/users/create"}"

Status code should be 200 OK after updating name
  Expected: OK
  But was:  Forbidden

Status code should be 200 OK for successful login
  Expected: OK
  But was:  BadRequest

Status code should be 200 OK after updating status
  Expected: OK
  But was:  Forbidden

Precondition failed: Access token is missing.
  Expected: False
  But was:  True

Status code should be 200 OK after soft deleting user
  Expected: OK
  But was:  Forbidden

Card should contain 'Ads' tag. Found: [NEWS, EVENTS]
  Expected: some item equal to "ADS"
  But was:  < "NEWS", "EVENTS" >

Search results should be displayed more, than 0.
  Expected: greater than 0
  But was:  0
